_readme: MAS TECH corporate marketing site (MAS_TECH_SOLUTION / Netlify). Append entries when shipping UI. Do not mix with Paradise frontend/.

entries.summary: Corporate site: hero video + deep metallic gold 'You ASK. We AUTOMATE.' (index.css); FounderNote duo (sonu_manthan.jpg / gurjar-sonu fallbacks + manthan-gurjar.jpeg), gold frame + Trishul watermark; Header larger gold-glow Trishul; Footer pill 'Powered by MAS TECH' + seal (canonicalLinks); FOUNDER_PHOTO.md duo paths.

Stakeholder demo: Contact page stripped of dev/JSON/setup panels; enterprise blue + gold body gradient; hero prominent Trishul + MAS TECH Solution line; form/CTA transitions; optional VITE_PUBLIC_CONTACT_EMAIL.

Monorepo merge: full Vite app from D: into MAS_TECH_SOLUTION/; removed full-bleed hero video loop; sticky header backdrop-blur 10px; HeroVideoPlayer 16:9 + HERO_PLAYLIST + arrows + keyboard; DEPLOYMENT.md Netlify base-directory checklist.

Canonical workspace sync: Paradise_markcom_pvt_ltd/MAS_TECH_SOLUTION → D:/MAS TECH/MAS_TECH_SOLUTION via robocopy (excluded node_modules, dist, .netlify, .git, .env*); npm run build verified on outer path.
Paradise monorepo: nested MAS_TECH_SOLUTION removed from git; this folder is sole marketing codebase; field-app mistakes log stays Paradise/docs/MISTAKES_LOG_MARKETING_SITE.md for agents.
Auto-deploy prep: .github/workflows/deploy-netlify.yml (push main + workflow_dispatch), NETLIFY_AUTO_DEPLOY.md, git init ready; .gitignore ignores full .netlify/.
Removed GitHub Actions Netlify workflow — single deploy path = Netlify Continuous deployment from Git (mastech-marketing-site main); NETLIFY_AUTO_DEPLOY.md + README updated.
HeroVideoPlayer: single overview MP4 only — removed poster (no photo flash), playlist/arrows/counter/keyboard carousel.
Hero video source: public/branding/Mas_Tech _Solution_01.mp4 (URL-encoded path in HeroVideoPlayer).
Hero playlist: mas-tech-solution-01..06.mp4, arrows + keyboard, auto-advance on ended, no poster; 01/02 seeded from overview + Solution_01 copies.
